text.title: python-fastapi Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure for a production FastAPI app.

step.name: bootstrap
step.action: `poetry add fastapi[standard] pydantic-settings sqlalchemy[asyncio] asyncpg alembic uvicorn`.
step.decision-gate: If using a non-async driver, abort and reconsider — methodology assumes async DB.

step.name: lifespan-and-deps
step.action: Create app with @asynccontextmanager lifespan; declare DBSession + CurrentUser Annotated aliases.
step.decision-gate: If team prefers separate `init_db` and `close_db` functions, wrap them inside lifespan.

step.name: schemas
step.action: For each entity, write Base/Create/Update/Response in `app/schemas/<entity>.py`; Response uses ConfigDict(from_attributes=True).
step.decision-gate: If shared fields are tiny, keep Base for >=2 fields; otherwise inline.

step.name: services
step.action: Create `app/services/<entity>.py` with async functions; each accepts AsyncSession + typed params, returns ORM. Use flush+refresh for IDs.
step.decision-gate: Routers MUST NOT import models directly; only services.

step.name: routers
step.action: Thin routers: `async def create_user(payload: UserCreate, db: DBSession) -> User: return await users_service.create(db, payload)`.
step.decision-gate: If a router exceeds 30 lines per endpoint, extract.

step.name: ci-gate
step.decision-gate: Block merge on any gate failure.
